description.value:
An alternative to the generic compact, vans offer slightly more durability and a sheltered cargo space in the rear, in exchange for being slightly slower and losing 2 seats. Up to 4 people can sit in the back of the van, but must make a DV15 Endurance check for trips which are longer than 20 minutes/more than one district - upon failure, they become fatigued (-2 to all actions) until they can rest (amount of rest proportional to the length of the trip, obviously).

Otherwise, they use the stats of a normal compact.

Tokens and Art by reddragon8928 on Discord. Redistributed with permission.
